title: The ability to perform an action on a mirror column
excerpt:
As of today it is possible to display mirror columns in one board from the other, alternatively you can display a mirror column from a board where there is a mirror column (a mirror of a mirror). 
It would be amazing if …

posts.author: Roni_Aviram (Roni)
posts.cookedHtml:
As of today it is possible to display mirror columns in one board from the other, alternatively you can display a mirror column from a board where there is a mirror column (a mirror of a mirror).
It would be amazing if it would be possible to add more options to mirror columns -

  • The ability to perform a filter on a mirror of a mirror column
  • The ability to perform formulas on a mirror column
  • The ability to perform automations on a mirror column

And in general perform more operations from a wider range of options on regular mirror columns as well as mirror mirror columns.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Roni_Aviram !

I just tested it, and you can use formulas that include a mirror column.

There are some apps that could work as workaround to better utilize mirror columns, such as General Caster and Autoboost.

But I agree, it would be nice if we could perform more actions with mirror columns!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
